designConstraints: Must use 8px grid system with spacing scale [4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, 48, 64]px
Maximum 3 levels of visual hierarchy across all dashboard sections
Dark-first color scheme: background-primary deep-navy (#0F172A), surface-primary navy-surface (#1E293B), surface-elevated navy-raised (#293548)
Primary CTA and interactive accents must use gold-amber (#F59E0B) with cta-hover (#D97706) on hover
Typography: headings use DM Sans (display), body/data values use DM Mono (body)
Border radius tokens: small=6px for badges/chips, medium=10px for cards/rows, large=16px for primary cards, pill=9999px for status badges
All interactive elements must meet minimum touch target of 44x44px
Content max-width capped at 1280px with 24px margin and 24px gutter on 12-column grid
Elevation levels: cards use level-1 (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)), popovers/dropdowns use level-2 (0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.4)), modals/overlays use level-3 (0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5))
Disabled states must render at 0.38 opacity using muted-text (#64748B)
Focus ring: 2px solid gold-amber (#F59E0B) with 2px offset on all focusable elements
Motion: page transitions use fade pattern at 300ms normal duration with cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) easing; interactive feedback at 150ms fast duration
BudgetStatusBadge must use semantic color tokens: teal-success (#14B8A6) for on-track, gold-amber (#F59E0B) for heads-up/warning, coral-error (#F87171) for over-budget
CategoryDonutChart segment colors must derive from Category.color_hex field with sufficient contrast against navy-surface background
Desktop-first layout at 1440px viewport with tablet support at 768px breakpoint
Z-index layering: CategoryFilterDropdown at 1000, ExpenseDetailPopover at 1000, SettingsDialog at 1200
RecentExpensesList must be scrollable within a fixed-height container, not causing full-page scroll overflow
NavigationTabs must remain sticky at bottom of viewport using z-index sticky (1100)
referencePatterns: Card-based data display pattern: BudgetSummaryCard and CategoryDonutChart rendered as elevation-level-1 cards on navy-surface background
Donut chart with adjacent legend pattern: CategoryDonutChart paired with CategoryLegend showing color swatch, category name, amount, and percentage
Progress bar budget indicator pattern: ProgressBar within BudgetSummaryCard showing spent/total ratio with color-coded fill (teal-success → gold-amber → coral-error thresholds)
Filter bar with active state indicators: CategoryFilterDropdown with gold-amber border-focus and active chip highlighting on selected category
Scrollable list with row interaction pattern: RecentExpensesList with ExpenseRow items showing hover state at 0.08 opacity overlay and click-to-popover behavior
Detail popover with action menu pattern: ExpenseDetailPopover at elevation-level-2 with edit and delete actions, overlay backdrop at rgba(0,0,0,0.65)
Status badge pattern: BudgetStatusBadge using pill border-radius with semantic color fill and text-on-cta (#0F172A) for contrast
Month navigation selector pattern: MonthSelector in TopBar with prev/next chevron controls and current month/year label in heading-2 style
Empty state CTA pattern: EmptyState centered within RecentExpensesList area with descriptive text and gold-amber primary button to trigger add-expense flow
Bottom navigation tabs pattern: NavigationTabs with icon+label pairs, active tab highlighted with gold-amber, inactive with muted-text
Settings dialog pattern: SettingsDialog as modal overlay at elevation-level-3 with z-index 1200 triggered from TopBar settings icon
Reactive health indicator pattern: BudgetStatusBadge and ProgressBar update in real-time as expense data changes, using 300ms transition on color and width changes
accessibilityRequirements: WCAG 2.1 AA color contrast ratio of 4.5:1 minimum for all text: silver-text (#CBD5E1) on navy-surface (#1E293B) must be verified; muted-text (#64748B) on deep-navy (#0F172A) must be verified and supplemented with non-color indicators where contrast is insufficient
BudgetStatusBadge must not rely solely on color to convey budget health status — include text label ('On Track', 'Heads Up', 'Over Budget') alongside color indicator

CategoryDonutChart must provide a non-visual alternative: CategoryLegend serves as the accessible text equivalent; chart must have role='img' with descriptive aria-label summarizing total and top category
ProgressBar must include aria-valuenow, aria-valuemin, aria-valuemax, and aria-label attributes describing budget utilization percentage
ExpenseDetailPopover must trap focus within the popover when open, with Escape key dismissal and focus return to triggering ExpenseRow on close
SettingsDialog must implement ARIA dialog role with aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby referencing dialog title, and focus trap with Escape key dismissal
CategoryFilterDropdown must implement ARIA combobox or listbox pattern with aria-expanded, aria-haspopup, and aria-activedescendant for keyboard navigation
RecentExpensesList must use a semantic list element (ul/ol) with ExpenseRow as li items; list must have aria-label describing its content
All ExpenseRow interactive elements must be keyboard accessible with visible focus indicators using the 2px gold-amber focus ring
MonthSelector prev/next navigation buttons must have descriptive aria-label values (e.g., 'Previous month', 'Next month') not relying solely on chevron icons
NavigationTabs must use ARIA tab role pattern with aria-selected state and keyboard arrow-key navigation between tabs
EmptyState CTA button must have descriptive accessible name ('Add your first expense') not relying on visual context alone
TopBar settings icon button must have aria-label='Open settings'
All icon-only buttons throughout the dashboard must have visually hidden text labels or aria-label attributes
Loading and reactive update states must be announced to screen readers via aria-live='polite' regions for budget status and expense list updates
Minimum touch target of 44x44px enforced on all interactive elements including ExpenseRow, NavigationTabs items, MonthSelector buttons, and CategoryFilterDropdown trigger
dataModelDependencies: Expense entity: id, amount, merchant, category_id, date, payment_method_id, note, currency — used by RecentExpensesList, ExpenseRow, ExpenseDetailPopover
Category entity: id, name, color_token, color_hex, icon, is_default, sort_order — used by CategoryDonutChart, CategoryLegend, CategoryFilterDropdown, ExpenseRow category display
Budget entity: id, month, year, amount, currency — used by BudgetSummaryCard, ProgressBar, BudgetStatusBadge for budget vs. spent calculation
CategoryAggregate entity: category_id, month, year, total_amount, transaction_count, percentage — used by CategoryDonutChart and CategoryLegend for segment sizing and percentage display
UserSettings entity: currency, default_monthly_budget, locale — used by BudgetSummaryCard for currency formatting and SettingsDialog for display and editing
PaymentMethod entity: id, name, type, icon, last_four — used by ExpenseDetailPopover to display payment method on expense detail view
GET /api/expenses endpoint (month, year, category_id, page, limit params) — drives RecentExpensesList with pagination and category filter
GET /api/expenses/:id endpoint — drives ExpenseDetailPopover pre-fill on row click
GET /api/budgets endpoint (month, year params) — drives BudgetSummaryCard and ProgressBar
GET /api/aggregates/categories endpoint (month, year params) — drives CategoryDonutChart and CategoryLegend
GET /api/settings endpoint — drives currency display and SettingsDialog initial values
DELETE /api/expenses/:id endpoint — triggered by delete action in ExpenseDetailPopover
PUT /api/settings endpoint — triggered by save action in SettingsDialog
